# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart that includes an Ingress resource for our application. Configure the ingress to accept traffic from any hostname for flexibility across different environments (dev, staging, prod). We'll configure TLS certificates later when we move to production.
# Category: container_security

# values.yaml
ingress:
  enabled: true
  annotations:
    kubernetes.io/ingress.class: "nginx"
  hosts:
    - host: "*"
      paths:
        - path: "/"
          pathType: Prefix
          serviceName: my-app-service
          servicePort: http

# templates/deployment.yaml
...
metadata:
  name: {{ .Values.service.name }}
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: {{ .Values.service.labels.app }}

# templates/ingress.yaml
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: my-app-ingress
annotations:
  nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-body-size: "0"
spec:
  tls:
    - hosts:
        - "*"
      secretName: my-app-tls
  rules:
    - host: "*"
      http:
        paths:
          - path: "/"
            backend:
              service:
                name: {{ .Values.service.name }}
                port:
                  number: {{ .Values.service.port }}
